data.title: 网页漫画 “百花缭乱试胆事件” Part 2 发布
data.summary: Sensei, the eagerly-awaited Part 2 of the "Hyakkaryouran Courage Test" webtoon has finally been rele
data.body:
Sensei, the eagerly-awaited Part 2 of the "Hyakkaryouran Courage Test" webtoon has finally been released!

➡️Details: [官网英文版](https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3203730)
